examples: He finished his dessert and patted his paunch.
I took a look at my growing paunch. I joined a gym.
Men are more likely to gain fat around the waist, so anything fattening can pad the paunch.
As if the riboflavin were going to lessen the damage this stuff does to your paunch?
With a sizable paunch and a sedentary lifestyle, Bryan Cecchi fits the mold of the typical middle-age American male.
